About Organization

The Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board (MPESB) is a government organization responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various government jobs in Madhya Pradesh.

The organization aims to provide fair and transparent recruitment processes for eligible candidates.

About the Programme

The MPESB Hospital Assistant Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for 1200 posts in Madhya Pradesh.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for hospital assistant positions in various government hospitals in Madhya Pradesh.
